name: Cleverbridge
description: Cleverbridge — Global Merchant of Record and subscription commerce platform for B2C and B2B software

seo.title: Cleverbridge — Invoicing / Taxes / Sales Tax
seo.meta_description: Cleverbridge: Cleverbridge — Global Merchant of Record and subscription commerce platform for B2C and B2B software

when_to_use: Global Merchant of Record for B2C software subscription with tax handling
Cross-border subscription commerce with local payment methods and compliance
Recurring billing and license management for enterprise software vendors
Global VAT/GST compliance managed by MoR without internal tax team

pros: Full Merchant of Record — handles tax and fraud
cons: Take rate eats margin on low-ASP SaaS
Slower to ship features than Lemon Squeezy/Paddle
review.verdict: Veteran MoR for serious software sellers — compliant and global, but expect legacy pace and pricing.
review.best_for: Established B2B and B2C software companies selling globally who want tax/fraud handled.
review.not_for: Indie devs or startups wanting modern DX and transparent low fees.
